impl.spec_text:
pub proof fn test(x: int, y: int, m: int) by(integer_ring)
            requires m != 0,
            ensures
                ((x % m) * y) % m == (x * y) % m,
                ((x % m) * (y % m)) % m == (x) % m, // FAILS
                (x * (y % m)) % m == (x) % m // also FAILS (but should not report this, since we stop at the first failure)
        {}
impl.impl_text:
pub proof fn test(x: int, y: int, m: int) by(integer_ring)
            requires m != 0,
            ensures
                ((x % m) * y) % m == (x * y) % m,
                ((x % m) * (y % m)) % m == (x) % m, // FAILS
                (x * (y % m)) % m == (x) % m // also FAILS (but should not report this, since we stop at the first failure)
        {}

lines.line_text: pub proof fn test(x: int, y: int, m: int) by(integer_ring)
(x * (y % m)) % m == (x) % m // also FAILS (but should not report this, since we stop at the first failure)
